description: Per-strategy conformance-vector coverage ledger. Each emitted locator strategy maps to the committed vector in which it is a measured-unique candidate (match_count 1, match_index 0) for the ground-truth element, recorded at element granularity. A hygiene lock ties every emitted strategy to a real committed vector, per platform. Extension: role_name and label are schema-reserved and not emitted, so they are outside vector scope. Desktop: every emitted strategy is either covered by a committed vector or listed under desktop-windows-gaps with a reason (a loud, accounted-for gap — never silently dropped); the union equals the emitted set.

labeled_by.reason: A Win32 STATIC preceding an EDIT surfaces as the EDIT's UIA Name but NOT as the UIA LabeledBy relation element — the relation is exposed only by a control with its own UIA provider. Adding it to the controlled fixture requires a server-side provider that MERGES the relation onto the native control (IRawElementProviderHwndOverride): a minimal WM_GETOBJECT override instead replaces the system EDIT's provider and loses its ControlType=Edit identity, which the other four strategies depend on (verified live). This is a tracked follow-up, not an accepted omission: labeled_by resolution, the snapshot edge, and the harness augmentation are implemented and unit-tested; only the live fixture vector is pending the provider-backed control.
